steps.title: Define the conditional sample space: non-motor neurons
steps.content: The condition not classified as a motor neuron restricts our sample space to Sensory neurons and Interneurons only. From the table: Sensory neurons total 13 + 9 + 3 = 25. Interneurons total 10 + 29 + 0 = 39. Combined sample space: 25 + 39 = 64 neurons.

steps.title: Count favorable outcomes and calculate probability
steps.content:
Among these 64 non-motor neurons, we need those with diameter ≤ 30 micrometers, which includes the Less than 20 and 20 to 30 columns.
Sensory neurons with diameter ≤ 30: 13 + 9 = 22
Interneurons with diameter ≤ 30: 10 + 29 = 39
Total favorable: 22 + 39 = 61
$$P(\text{diameter} \leq 30 \mid \text{not motor}) = \frac{61}{64} = 0.953125 \approx 0.9531$$
Equivalent forms accepted: 61/64, 0.953, .9531.
